overrides.expect: U _ {i} (n) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} S (n) & \text {if i\geq n / 2}, \\ \lfloor n / 2 \rfloor + U _ {i} (\lceil n / 2 \rceil) + S (2 i) & \text {otherwise}. \end{array} \right.
